emails.subject: Request for NDA
emails.body: Request for NDA Tana, John Pavetto asked if you could prepare a standard NDA for the following company: Ajilon, L.L.C. 16225 Park Ten Place Suite 620 Houston, TX 77084 Attn.: Ken Keefer Ken Keefer is not sure who will sign on behalf of Ajilon. David Berberian (Managing Director) will sign for Net Works. John has a meeting with them the week of May 14. Please let me know if you need any additional info. Thanks! Sheri

emails.subject: Request for NDA
emails.body: Request for NDA Tana, John Pavetto asked if you could prepare a standard NDA for the following company: Ajilon, L.L.C. 16225 Park Ten Place Suite 620 Houston, TX 77084 Attn.: Ken Keefer Ken Keefer is not sure who will sign on behalf of Ajilon. David Berberian (Managing Director) will sign for Net Works. John has a meeting with them the week of May 14. Please let me know if you need any additional info. Thanks! Sheri

emails.subject: Re: Request for NDA
emails.body: Re: Request for NDA Sheri, I need to know the nature of the discussions we will be having with this company so I know how to word the decription in the agreement. Also, usually I email the agreements directly to the counterparty, so unless he will be delivering this in another manner, I will need an email address. Sheri L Cromwell/ENRON@enronXgate 05/02/2001 04:34 PM

emails.subject: RE: Request for NDA
emails.body: RE: Request for NDA Tana, John said to put the NDA on hold. We'll send another request if they decide to discuss anything further. Thanks for your help! sc Sheri L.
